text: In this paper we give an overview of recent advances in the analysis of mobile phone data. This research area started a decade ago with the availability of large anonymized datasets from mobile phone operators, and has in the meantime developed into a full scientific area by itself. In this paper we review recent results on social network analysis of mobile phone data, mobility analysis, location areas, urban planning, sustainable development, aid delivery, security and privacy.
